reasoning: The control CCCS RA-5 focuses on vulnerability monitoring and scanning, which can be mapped to Kubernetes through image vulnerability scanning and admission control policies that enforce vulnerability checks. Kubernetes environments can implement image scanning on admission to ensure that only images without known vulnerabilities are deployed. Additionally, admission controllers can enforce policies that prevent the deployment of vulnerable images or configurations. Pod security standards can also include checks for known vulnerabilities.
title: CCCS RA-5: Vulnerability Monitoring and Scanning
